steps.title: Identify the key requirement from the passage
steps.content: The passage claims discoveries “have persisted into the 2000s”—the example must show a hoard discovered in the 2000s.

steps.title: Find the 2000s entry and match it to the choices
steps.content:
The table lists only one hoard discovered in the 2000s: Carrick-on-Suir (2013).

Choice B states this directly, providing the specific evidence needed to support the passage's claim.

The other choices either mix this with pre-2000 discoveries, don't highlight the 2000s timeframe, or contain factual errors.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
